name: orca
description: Spawn or fork Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn or fork Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs.
interface.longDescription: Orca packages skills for launching fresh AI coding workers or forking existing provider conversations into cmux tabs, then reporting the resulting surface.
defaultPrompt: Spawn a Codex worker for this task
Hand this bug to Claude Code in cmux
Fork this Codex conversation in a new cmux tab
